channel.title: Functional Brain Imaging Lab — News
channel.description: Latest news from the Functional Brain Imaging Lab at Sunnybrook Research Institute

item.title: New Publication in eLife
item.description: Matthew W Rozak et al. published "A deep learning pipeline for mapping in situ network-level neurovascular coupling in multi-photon fluorescence microscopy" in eLife.

item.title: New Publication in Journal of cerebral blood flow and metabolism
item.description: Adrienne Dorr et al. published "Persistent dysmorphology and dysfunction of the brain microvasculature following repeated trauma" in Journal of cerebral blood flow and metabolism.

item.title: New Publication in Imaging neuroscience
item.description: Monica Bell Vila et al. published "Parametrizing alternating current stimulation for neuromodulation" in Imaging neuroscience.

item.title: New Publication in Theranostics
item.description: Alessandro De Maio et al. published "Tissue-type Differences in Focused Ultrasound and Microbubble-mediated Drug Delivery to the Brain Exist at Vessel Level" in Theranostics.

item.title: Margaret Koletar wins inaugural Excellence in Research Service Award
item.description: Margaret Koletar, a research technician in the Functional Brain Imaging Lab, was a recipient of the inaugural Excellence in Research Service Award at the Sunnybrook Research Institute (SRI) for her significant contributions to the research environment.

item.title: New Publication in bioRxiv
item.description: Keying Chen et al. published "Stable neuronal representations to repeated stimulation underlie cognitive resilience in Alzheimer's disease pathology" in bioRxiv.

item.title: New Publication in Alzheimer's & dementia
item.description: Dustin Loren V Almanza et al. published "High-caloric intake rescues early symptomatic AD-induced hippocampal neurovascular coupling deficits" in Alzheimer's & dementia.

item.title: New Publication in Journal of controlled release
item.description: Alessandro De Maio et al. published "Evaluation of focused ultrasound modulation of the blood-brain barrier in gray and white matter" in Journal of controlled release.

item.title: New Publication in Magnetic resonance in medicine
item.description: Lisa M Gazdzinski et al. published "Minimally invasive measurement of carotid artery and brain temperature in the mouse" in Magnetic resonance in medicine.

item.title: New Publication in Nature methods
item.description: Ahmadreza Attarpour et al. published "A deep learning pipeline for three-dimensional brain-wide mapping of local neuronal ensembles in teravoxel light-sheet microscopy" in Nature methods.

item.title: New Publication in Theranostics
item.description: Andrea Trevisiol et al. published "Deep brain stimulation-induced normalization of hippocampal synchrony in a transgenic rat model of Alzheimer's disease" in Theranostics.

item.title: New Publication in Brain communications
item.description: Jazlynn Xiu Min Tan et al. published "Stepwise connectivity of the entorhinal cortex along connectomic gradients in Alzheimer's disease" in Brain communications.

item.title: New Publication in Journal of Alzheimer's disease
item.description: Howard Chertkow et al. published "Impact of a national dementia research consortium: The Canadian Consortium on Neurodegeneration in Aging (CCNA)" in Journal of Alzheimer's disease.

item.title: Emma Pineau wins poster award at SRI Research Day
item.description: Emma Pineau, a trainee in the Physical Sciences platform under Dr. Stefanovic's supervision, was awarded for her poster presentation at the Sunnybrook Research Institute Research Day.

item.title: New Publication in Nature communications
item.description: Julie Ottoy et al. published "Tau follows principal axes of functional and structural brain organization in Alzheimer's disease" in Nature communications.

item.title: New Publication in Journal of cerebral blood flow and metabolism
item.description: Johnson Yu et al. published "Micro-ultrasound based characterization of cerebrovasculature following focal ischemic stroke and upon short-term rehabilitation" in Journal of cerebral blood flow and metabolism.

item.title: New Publication in NeuroImage
item.description: James R Mester et al. published "Network response of brain microvasculature to neuronal stimulation" in NeuroImage.

item.title: New Publication in Theranostics
item.description: Dustin Loren V Almanza et al. published "High caloric intake improves neuronal metabolism and functional hyperemia in a rat model of early AD pathology" in Theranostics.

item.title: New Publication in Neurotherapeutics
item.description: Dene Ringuette et al. published "Spreading depolarization suppression from inter-astrocytic gap junction blockade assessed with multimodal imaging and a novel wavefront detection scheme" in Neurotherapeutics.

item.title: CIHR Project Grant awarded to Dr. Stefanovic
item.description: Dr. Stefanovic and Dr. McLaurin were awarded a CIHR Project Grant of $975,375 over five years for their project "Imaging metrics of neuronal stochasticity and brain resilience," investigating neuronal contributors to cognitive resilience in Alzheimer's disease.
